---
title: "5k Event ROI Analysis"
format: html
---


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
```

```{r}
cost_data <- data.frame(
  category = c(
    "Signage",
    "Community Event Supplies/Vendors",
    "Volunteer Supplies",
    "Race Equipment/Supplies",
    "Timing Company/Race Management",
    "Event Equipment"
  ),
  total_cost = c(6054, 15211, 3646, 31883, 28478, 29686),
  cost_type = c(
    "Mixed",
    "Unrecoverable",
    "Unrecoverable",
    "Recoverable",
    "Recoverable",
    "Unrecoverable"
  )
)

```


```{r}
revenue_data <- data.frame(
  source = c("Race Roster", "Sponsorships"),
  revenue = c(83802, 61000)
)

```

```{r}
total_cost <- sum(cost_data$total_cost)
total_revenue <- sum(revenue_data$revenue)
net_profit <- total_revenue - total_cost
roi <- (net_profit / total_cost) * 100

recoverable_cost <- 62000
unrecoverable_cost <- 52958

summary_table <- data.frame(
  metric = c(
    "Total Cost",
    "Recoverable Cost",
    "Unrecoverable Cost",
    "Total Revenue",
    "Net Profit",
    "ROI Percent"
  ),
  value = c(
    total_cost,
    recoverable_cost,
    unrecoverable_cost,
    total_revenue,
    net_profit,
    roi
  )
)

print(summary_table)
```

```{r}
cost_data <- cost_data %>%
  mutate(share_of_total = total_cost / sum(total_cost))

print(cost_data)

```


```{r}
revenue_data <- revenue_data %>%
  mutate(share_of_total = revenue / sum(revenue))

print(revenue_data)
```

```{r}
ggplot(cost_data, aes(x = reorder(category, total_cost), y = total_cost)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar_format()) +
  labs(
    title = "5K 2026 Cost by Category",
    x = "Category",
    y = "Cost"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
ggplot(revenue_data, aes(x = reorder(source, revenue), y = revenue)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = dollar_format()) +
  labs(
    title = "5K 2026 Revenue by Source",
    x = "Revenue Source",
    y = "Revenue"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
cat("Total Cost: $", comma(total_cost), "\n", sep = "")
cat("Total Revenue: $", comma(total_revenue), "\n", sep = "")
cat("Net Profit: $", comma(net_profit), "\n", sep = "")
cat("ROI: ", round(roi, 2), "%\n", sep = "")
```



```{r}
scenarios <- data.frame(
  scenario = c("Low", "Baseline", "High"),
  revenue_multiplier = c(0.90, 1.00, 1.20)
)

scenario_results <- scenarios %>%
  mutate(
    projected_revenue = total_revenue * revenue_multiplier,
    projected_profit = projected_revenue - total_cost,
    projected_roi = (projected_profit / total_cost) * 100
  )

print(scenario_results)
```


```{r}
ggplot(scenario_results, aes(x = scenario, y = projected_roi)) +
  geom_col() +
  labs(
    title = "5K 2026 ROI Scenario Analysis",
    x = "Scenario",
    y = "ROI (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
break_even_revenue <- total_cost
additional_revenue_needed <- max(0, break_even_revenue - total_revenue)

break_even_table <- data.frame(
  metric = c("Break-even Revenue Needed", "Additional Revenue Needed"),
  value = c(break_even_revenue, additional_revenue_needed)
)

print(break_even_table)
```


```{r}
value_per_passenger <- 20

estimated_passengers_to_cover_total_cost <- total_cost / value_per_passenger
estimated_passengers_to_generate_net_profit <- net_profit / value_per_passenger

proxy_table <- data.frame(
  metric = c(
    "Passengers Needed to Cover Total Cost",
    "Passenger Equivalent of Net Profit"
  ),
  value = c(
    estimated_passengers_to_cover_total_cost,
    estimated_passengers_to_generate_net_profit
  )
)

print(proxy_table)
```
